repos.name: OneClickApply
repos.description: Built a Chrome extension that auto-fills job application forms using resume data. Supports dynamic resume parsing by allowing initial resume upload and mapping fields to job portals, significantly reducing manual application time.

repos.name: notesApp
repos.description: Created a flask web app to store notes

repos.name: Getx_Weather_app
repos.description: Created a weather application which uses GetX state management

repos.name: first-bloc-app
repos.description: Created a counter app which would add, subtract and reset the counter using Bloc state management. Created two stream controllers stateStreamController and EventStreamController. I created stateStreamController so that the app does not build multiple times when the counter is increased and created eventStreamController to separate the UI and logic
